results.name: Multi-Turn Multi-Agent Self-Play

decision_rationale: No prior art reaches kw>=2 / sem>=0.7 / func>=0.7; collective K-student fono cross-attention + senior-junior staged progression + canonical-target prerequisite + senior-consensus tau gate + long-ballad reward + Bartok augmentation cycle appears novel composition. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.78-0.88 / func 0.78-0.88 on self-play + distillation + curriculum adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
